programme.title: HobbyKidsTV
programme.desc: Come along for the fun with popular YouTube family, HobbyKidsTV! Plus, HobbyKids Adventures!

programme.title: Aloha
programme.desc: A celebrated military contractor returns to the site of his greatest career triumphs and re-connects with a long-ago love while unexpectedly falling for the hard-charging Air Force watchdog assigned to him.

programme.title: Ceremony
programme.desc: Sam Davis convinces his former best friend Marshall to spend a weekend with him out on Long Island in an attempt to rekindle their friendship. However, Sam has ulterior motives as he crashes the wedding of a woman (Uma Thurman) he still loves. As Sam's plans begin to unravel, the young men quickly realize how complicated love and friendship can be.

programme.title: Brighton
programme.desc: Derek, Dinah, Dave and Doreen are two retired couples, who return to the seaside resort of Brighton after an absence of 40 years in an uproarious attempt to relive their youth. Flashbacks reveal teenage Derek and Dave as a couple of cockney chancers out to pull as many girls as they can, and Dinah and Doreen down from London and enjoying independence for the very first time in their lives. A chance meeting on their return to the seaside will bring up old rivalries and tensions and lead to a hilarious clash between the old world and the new.

programme.title: Cheap Thrills
programme.desc: Struggling family man Craig loses his low-wage job and is threatened with eviction. In an effort to delay facing the music at home, he heads to a local bar and encounters an old friend. The two friends are roped into a round of drinks by charismatic and obscenely wealthy strangers. The couple engages the two friends in a series of innocent dares in exchange for money. It seems like easy and much needed money, but the couple's twisted sense of humor pushes just how far Craig and his friend are willing to go for money and cheap thrills.

programme.title: Ghost World
programme.desc: Deliciously dry and quirky, Ghost World, based on the cult comic book, is like no other teen comedy you've seen before! Original and terrifically funny, Ghost World is a raw-edged comedy that follows Enid (Thora Birch - American Beauty) and Rebecca (Scarlett Johansson - The Horse Whisperer), two teenage girls who have always been too cool to bother with the losers in their high school. Embarrassing the local 'freaks' and laughing at all around, their friendship is founded on the mutual conviction that pretty much everything sucks!

programme.title: We Still Kill The Old Way (2014)
programme.desc: When retired East End villain Charlie Archer is murdered by a feral street gang, his brother Ritchie returns to London from Spain to investigate. With the police investigation drawing blank after blank, Ritchie decides to take the law into his own hands and bring his old school justice back to the streets of East London. Rounding up his old firm, he leads a vigilante crusade against the vicious young criminals, using every grizzly method at his disposal to find and punish his brother's killers. They're outgunned and outnumbered, but this firm has never been outclassed yet!

programme.title: We Still Steal The Old Way
programme.desc: Regarded as the best in the business, The Archer Gang are back in this explosive follow-up to We Still Kill The Old Way. When the infamous 70s underworld legends are tasked with robbing Britain's richest Banker, they are caught mid-heist and sentenced to do time in Britain's toughest prison. Once inside, they encounter their old nemesis Slick Vic Farrow (Billy Murray, Rise of the Footsoldier) who is intent on murdering the gang. Now with the help of a terrifying life sentencer - psychotic serial killer, David, the old-school criminals need to use all their wits to take down Slick Vic, set in motion a heart-stopping, brutal prison riot and stage a daring escape!

programme.title: Adventures of a Plumber's Mate
programme.desc: Times are hard for plumber Sid South. Up to his neck in bills, facing eviction from his home and in debt to a violent bookie, he desperately needs to raise some funds or else Sid will be a broken man - literally, as there are two thugs ready to break every bone in his body unless he hands over the cash he owes their boss. It doesn't help that Sid never seems to get paid for any of the work he does, as his occupation lands him in a variety of risqu situations which always end in disaster. Drastic times call for drastic measures, and the browbeaten plumber seeks employment from Dodger, a shady wheeler-dealer who can put some dubious work Sid's way. But, as always, things never seem to go exactly to plan and the beguiled plumber finds himself in further strife.

programme.title: Very Good Girls
programme.desc: During their last summer together before college, best friends Lilly Berger (Dakota Fanning) and Gerri Field (Elizabeth Olsen) bump into an enigmatic stranger who quickly becomes the object of both their affections. Without telling Gerri, Lilly is drawn into a relationship with David (Boyd Holbrook) - and before too long, Lilly is caught between loyalty to her friend and her new found love.

programme.title: Mercenary for Justice
programme.desc: When John Seeger is blackmailed into leading a highly dangerous rescue attempt to free a billionaire's kidnapped son in South Africa, he commits to the job. But when he discovers that he's been double-crossed the gloves come off.

programme.title: Samson
programme.desc: Samson is based on the powerful, biblical epic of a champion chosen by God to deliver Israel. His supernatural strength and impulsive decisions quickly pit him against the oppressive Philistine empire. Feat: Taylor James, Billy Zane & Rutger Hauer.

programme.title: Beyond the Law
programme.desc: A former mobster turned businessman and a police detective must contend with a dirty ex-cop looking to bring the killer of his son to justice.

programme.title: D-Day: Dog Company
programme.desc: When an elite group of American soldiers are ordered to take out a series of German machine gun nests, they find themselves blindly venturing into hostile territory.

programme.title: For The Love Of George
programme.desc: Quirky comedy about a jilted wife who leaves her cheating husband in England and sets off to LA hoping to meet who she believes is the perfect man - George Clooney.

programme.title: Kon-Tiki
programme.desc: Legendary explorer Thor Heyerdahl's epic 4,300-mile crossing of the Pacific on a balsawood raft in 1947, in an effort to prove that it was possible for South Americans to settle in Polynesia in pre-Columbian times.

programme.title: Rainfall
programme.desc: Saving the woman he loves won't be easy, but John Rain will not stop until he is sure she is safe

programme.title: Open Windows
programme.desc: Nick's a lucky guy. Tonight, he'll be having dinner with Jill Goddard, the hottest actress on earth. She's promoting her latest movie and he's won the main prize in an online contest. Then he gets a call. Some guy named Chord explains that dinner has been cancelled. And it's Jill's fault: she's a high- maintenance diva, and everybody hates her guts. Chord says he can make up for it.

programme.title: Love On Harbor Island
programme.desc: Interior designer Lily returns home to help her Aunt Maggie run her marina-side bed and breakfast when she meets Marcus, a handsome seaplane pilot whose work delivering rescue dogs helps Lily discover that home really is where the heart is.

programme.title: Love in Tahiti
programme.desc: Brielle has always believed the ocean floor is full of treasures just waiting to be found. Over the years she has dived to find coins, lost jewelry and more in the waters of Tahiti. Instead of profiting from them, she loves reuniting people with their lost valuables. When she finds a class ring and returns it to Marcus, a handsome US Navy serviceman, Brielle soon discovers what has been missing in her life – a treasure of the heart.

programme.title: Midway to Love
programme.desc: When the network announces that her television therapy show is changing to a tabloid shock-fest, a straight laced and caring psychologist returns to her hometown and reunites with her high school sweetheart while finally realizing that having someone to share a life with is more important than fame and the excitement of the city.

programme.title: Eat, Drink And Be Married
programme.desc: Three days from their wedding, Jess and Max are about to call it off. However, Jess starts to question her decision when Max's brother enlists the help of Billie to save the wedding, and in the process starts to fall for her.

programme.title: Love in Tahiti
programme.desc: Brielle has always believed the ocean floor is full of treasures just waiting to be found. Over the years she has dived to find coins, lost jewelry and more in the waters of Tahiti. Instead of profiting from them, she loves reuniting people with their lost valuables. When she finds a class ring and returns it to Marcus, a handsome US Navy serviceman, Brielle soon discovers what has been missing in her life – a treasure of the heart.

programme.title: A Coffin from Sartana
programme.desc: After witnessing a brutal massacre, the legendary hero Sartana is ready to do some investigating. Almost everyone in the tiny town of Indian Creek seems eager to buy up the property left behind by the murder victims, ...

programme.title: Boot Hill
programme.desc: Victims of oppressive town boss Honey are offered help by an unusual alliance of gunmen and circus performers.

programme.title: Django Kill... If You Live, Shoot!
programme.desc: Various factions, feud over stolen gold in a surreal town.

programme.title: Against a Crooked Sky
programme.desc: A lone gunman tracks down the members of an outlaw gang that killed his friends.

programme.title: The Christmas Lodge
programme.desc: During a weekend trip to the mountains, Mary finds herself at the now run-down lodge where she spent the holidays with her family growing up. She becomes determined to restore the building to its former glory.

programme.title: Christmas in Wonderland
programme.desc: Starring Matthew Knight and Chris Kattan. Three children and their father move from California to Canada. When they go shopping at the mall, they find counterfeit cash, inadvertently help catch crooks, and make a discovery about Santa.

programme.title: A Candlelit Christmas
programme.desc: Ellie, a perfume maker, travels back home for Christmas and help her dad with the business. Little does she know, that Logan is staying with him. As Ellie's attempts to learn about her family, Logan helps her realize that fairy tales do indeed exist!

programme.title: Christmas Harmony
programme.desc: Harmony's pop star boyfriend breaks up with her right before the holiday season, but when she returns to her hometown she discovers the heart and music that her life has been missing.

programme.title: A Christmas to Savour
programme.desc: Scarlett is a chef but every year her holiday dishes never sell. So this year, her best friend buys her a ticket for a holiday...maybe she will find love in a handsome rival chef from her past, and regain the Christmas spirit.

programme.title: 5 to 7
programme.desc: Capturing the giddy thrill and pain of being young and in love, this sizzling romance stars, Glenn Close (Fatal Attraction), Anton Yelchin (Star Trek) and Bérénice Marlohe (Skyfall). A chance encounter on the streets of Manhattan draws a writer into an illicit love affair with a glamorous French woman. The catch? She's married and can only meet him between the hours of 5pm and 7pm.

programme.title: Operation Overlord
programme.desc: A week before storming the beaches of Normandy, two US soldiers infiltrate an abandoned complex to rescue a prisoner of war from the Germans.

programme.title: Navy Seals Vs. Zombies
programme.desc: A team of highly skilled Navy Seals find themselves embarking on the battle of their lives when they come face-to-face with the undead. After a deadly outbreak occurs in New Orleans, the Seals must fight for their lives, and the city, against an army of zombies. A.K.A. Navy Seals: Battle for New Orleans

programme.title: Sincerely, Yours, Truly
programme.desc: Hayley stumbles upon a bundle of letters with an engagement ring from a mysterious sender, she decides to respond to him with her own alias, and with it start the anonymous correspondence that will change her life forever.

programme.title: Starting Up Love
programme.desc: When workaholic Jillian gets a note that her long-lost, wealthy uncle has passed away, she finds he's left her his beautiful mountainside cabin – and a family she never knew existed. Jillian's plan is to sell the cabin as soon as possible and move on, but when she meets handsome caretaker Liam, he makes her an offer she can't refuse. Sparks fly as they work together to transform the cabin into a holiday resort. When business doesn't go as planned and she almost loses her newfound family, Jillian needs to make a decision. Will she give up everything for the love she never saw coming?

programme.title: Chain Letter
programme.desc: Six friends receive a mysterious chain letter via text and email from a maniac who hunts down those who delete the message. Who knew they should take the threats in the chain letter seriously or that their favorite technologies could help track and kill them?

programme.title: Charade
programme.desc: Romance and suspense ensue in Paris as a woman is pursued by several men who want a fortune her murdered husband had stolen. Who can she trust?

programme.title: Civilian
programme.desc: In an operation during his military duty, Emrah (21) has killed a guerilla and found a notebook with a letter in it. Back to his home, he starts a search to find the recipient of the letter, while losing himself in his inner world.

programme.title: Crossroads
programme.desc: Valery Liashkevich is now considered an important Belarus artist - but just one year ago, he was living in the railway station and for over twenty years has painted pictures in the streets of the town of Gomel. For the natives he is no more than a local attraction, but the filmmakers set out to show that this eccentric artist and philosopher has many impor-tant truths to tell us about the meaning of life, that his work and attitude to the world make deep sense.

programme.title: Cyrano de Bergerac
programme.desc: The charismatic swordsman-poet helps another woo the woman he loves in this straightforward version of the play.

programme.title: Shes Funny That Way
programme.desc: A married Broadway director falls for a call-girl-turned-actress and works to help her advance her career, but things get a little more complicated than they bargained for.

programme.title: Heartbreakers
programme.desc: Max and Page are a brilliant mother and daughter con team who have their gift down to a fine art.

programme.title: Traffic
programme.desc: A conservative judge is appointed by the President to spearhead America's escalating war against drugs, only to discover that his teenage daughter is an addict.

programme.title: Breaking Infinity
programme.desc: Breaking Infinity is a time-bending thriller about a research scientist named Liam, who has become unstuck in time. The only people Liam can count on for help are the doctor treating him, Emma, who's convinced he's suffering from delusions and his lab assistant Garret. As Liam's episodes become more intense, and his jumps through time more extreme, Liam travels from the distant past where he's guided by a mysterious Old Man, to the future where he witnesses the end of the world - an apocalypse he may have caused.

programme.title: Occupation Rainfall
programme.desc: From the VFX team behind The Last Jedi and Blade Runner 2049, Occupation Rainfall is a sci-fi action epic with an all star cast including Harry Potter's Jason Isaacs, The Mandalorian's Temuera Morrison and The Hangover's Ken Jeong. After an intergalactic invasion of Earth, where survivors are fighting back in a desperate ground war, the resistance uncover a plot that could see the war come to a decisive end for mankind. With the alien invaders hell-bent on making Earth their new home, the race is on to save the planet. Occupation Rainfall Is an explosive sci-fi extravaganza that grips from start to thrilling finish.

programme.title: ShockWave: Countdown to Disaster
programme.desc: A stolen seismic weapon is activated in Yemen. A hostage freed there tries in vain to warn against its global effect. It starts seismic activity at the Californian fault line where her daughter and ex are monitoring it. Can they stop it?

programme.title: Last Survivors
programme.desc: Last Survivors takes place in a post-apocalyptic world where Troy (Stephen Moyer) raises his now grown son, Jake (Drew Van Acker), in a perfect wooded utopia thousands of miles away from the decayed cities. When Troy is severely wounded, Jake is forced to travel to the outside world to find life-saving medicine. Ordered to kill anyone he encounters, Jake defies his father by engaging in a forbidden relationship with a mysterious woman, Henrietta (Alicia Silverstone). As Jake continues this dangerous affair, Troy will stop at nothing to get rid of Henrietta and protect the perfect utopia he created.

programme.title: My Zoe
programme.desc: Prepare for one of the most emotionally-engaging film of the year. My Zoe is a heartbreaking family drama with a dystopian science fiction twist starring Julie Delpy (Before Sunrise), Richard Armitage (The Hobbit franchise, The Stranger), Gemma Arterton (Summerland) and Daniel Brühl (Captain America: Civil War). Isabelle (Julie Delpy) is a divorcee recovering from a toxic marriage but still forced into contact with her ex (Richard Armitage) because they are co-parenting their daughter Zoe. When tragedy strikes this fractured family, Isabelle - a top-level scientist - takes matters into her own hands an unexpected and shocking way."

programme.title: Blue Moon Ball
programme.desc: A writer returns to her hometown for inspiration and reinkindles her romance with her first love.

programme.title: Advance and Retreat
programme.desc: An ambitious junior executive is reunited with her first love at a corporate retreat, ultimately realizing that she might have to take a step back to make a leap forward.

programme.title: At Home With Tori
programme.desc: Tori teams up with Million Dollar Matchmaker Patti Stanger to host a series of dates for Morgan, one of her single friends.

programme.title: At Home With Tori
programme.desc: Tori teams up with Million Dollar Matchmaker Patti Stanger to host a series of dates for Morgan, one of her single friends.

programme.title: One Last Dance
programme.desc: In the wake of tragedy, a renowned NY dance company is on the brink of collapse. After leaving the dance world for good, Travis, Chrissa and Max have one last chance to re-connect with the passion and prove that miracles really can happen.

programme.title: Despite the Falling Snow
programme.desc: In 1950s Moscow, communist Katya secretly spies for the Americans in the Cold War arms race. When she lands her biggest assignment, stealing secrets from rising government star Alexander, the last thing she expects is to fall in love with him. When Alexander unwittingly closes the net around his own wife, Katya decides to make the ultimate sacrifice to protect him - a sacrifice that Alexander only uncovers thirty years later.

programme.title: Top End Wedding
programme.desc: Top End Wedding is a feel-good road trip comedy from the producers of The Sapphires. Engaged and in love Lauren and Ned have just 10 days until their dream wedding in the remote far north of Australia. But there's only one issue... Lauren's mother has gone AWOL! The couple embarks on a fantastic road trip to find her. But will they find her in time and will their love resist the ultimate test?

programme.title: Making Tracks
programme.desc: Lucy (April Pearson) and Chris (Chris Willoughby) are cut adrift in their thirties struggling to remember what initially attracted them to one another and wondering where they go from here... Cue an impulsive decision to spend a fortnight interrailing around Europe's most romantic destinations, in the hope that this might save their seemingly doomed relationship. What ensues is bold, bonkers and a comic treat as Chris and Lucy travel through the backdrop of Europe's most beautiful cities with chaos, debauchery and disaster following them at every turn!

programme.title: As I Am
programme.desc: One week of school remains for Kai, an aspiring writer, and his friends. How they spend this time will cost one of them their life and leave them changed forever.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: Caught between the worlds of the supernatural and human, Hellboy battles an ancient sorceress bent on revenge.

programme.title: The Haunted World of El Superbeasto
programme.desc: El SuperBeasto! He's big, he's bad, and he's really, really big!

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: Caught between the worlds of the supernatural and human, Hellboy battles an ancient sorceress bent on revenge.

programme.title: Hellboy: Sword of Storms
programme.desc: A folklore professor becomes unwittingly possessed by the ancient Japanese demons of Thunder and Lightning.

programme.title: Beyond Suspicion
programme.desc: Ready to right some old wrongs in this edge-of-your-seat revenge thriller. When a drug bust goes wrong, notorious ex-cop Danny Gallagher's (Karl Urban: The Lord of the Rings) quest for justice leads him to the car-bomb murder of a government official's wife. Discovering the woman's secret lover was a seductive federal agent (Sofia Vergara: Modern Family), he finds himself under fire. But from who?

programme.title: Lucky Grandma
programme.desc: A dark comedy full of heart, laughs and wicked sass. The story of a cardigan clad, chain smoking Chinese Grandma who in an attempt to get some cash goes all in at a casino but lands herself on the wrong side of luck. When she steals loot from a dead criminal boss, she hires a rival gangland bodyguard to protect her from the violent crooks who are after her to reclaim the cash.

programme.title: Concrete Plans
programme.desc: Frightfest Presents. A manor house in disrepair and a landowner with a fierce temper and cash flow problem meets his match when confronted with a bill he cant pay. Time is running out and the builders want their pound of flesh. When it becomes clear there is no cash, a red mist descends. Starring James Lance (Ted Lasso), Amber Rose Revah (The Punisher) and Steve Speirs (Upstart Crow).

programme.title: The Void
programme.desc: Enter this blood-soaked nightmare at your own risk. When police officer Carter happens upon a blood-soaked figure limping down a deserted road, he rushes the man to a hospital, only to discover a horrifying reality all linked to the mysterious hooded cult figures who are surrounding the hospital. Now Carter must lead the survivors on a hellish voyage in a bid to survive! Totally mind-bending!

programme.title: Can't Come Out To Play
programme.desc: A disturbing, skin-crawling horror thriller, featuring a stand-out performance from Michael Shannon (The Iceman) and directed by John McNaughton (Wild Things). A mentally unstable physician (Samantha Morton: Minority Report) keeps her dying son secluded from the outside world in a bid to preserve his life. Experience this chilling, psychological horror about a mother's obsessive love. A must see!

programme.title: Cut Bank
programme.desc: A young man's life is unravelled after witnessing a murder that he filmed in his rural town of Cut Bank. Starring Liam Hemsworth, John Malkovich and Billy Bob Thornton (2014)

programme.title: Match Point
programme.desc: A former tennis pro falls for an actress who happens to be dating his friend and soon-to-be brother-in-law. Starring Scarlett Johansson (2005)

programme.title: The Student
programme.desc: A college professor is threatened by her overly ambitious student who will stop at nothing to get what he wants. Starring Alicia Leigh Willis (2017)

programme.title: Run To Me
programme.desc: An amateur triathlete falls under the spell of a controversial trainer who utilizes experimental hypnotherapy. Starring Claire Forlani (2016)

programme.title: Accidentally In Love
programme.desc: Edie finds true love in London just days before she is to return to the US. They are separated, but as fate would have it, they reunite 6 years later in the US.

programme.title: The Birthday Wish
programme.desc: Gwen is turning 30 and is expecting her boyfriend to propose. But when the proposal does not materialise, she makes a birthday wish to take a glimpse into her future. Is it what she envisaged? (2017)

programme.title: A Dash of Love
programme.desc: Nikki is an aspiring chef who lands her dream job. After a rocky start, she grows closer to Paul, the head chef. Together, will they create the perfect recipe for love? Brendan Penny stars. (2016)

programme.title: One Winter Weekend
programme.desc: A recently dumped travel writer goes on a ski getaway with her best friend and they find themselves double booked with two eligible men. When they are snowed in, love ensues, as it always does. (2018)

programme.title: One Of A Kind Love
programme.desc: Kyra's dream of becoming a jeweller might come to fruition. Little does she know someone has manifested a life for her too. (2020)

programme.title: Olympic Dreams
programme.desc: Penelope is a first time Olympian and an introverted cross-country skier, who, after finishing her event early on in the games, finds herself spending time in Athletes Village with the gregarious and outgoing volunteer dentist, Ezra. While both are eager to form connections at the Olympic Games, they are held back by the very thing that has propelled them to this point what do you do once your lifelong dream has come true, and you're faced with taking the next step? As Penelope and Ezra navigate the vulnerable slopes, they push one another to embrace qualities they lost sight of in pursuit of their dreams.

programme.title: Fireflies in the Garden
programme.desc: The Taylor family is devastated by an accident that takes place on the day their matriarch is due to graduate from college - decades after leaving to raise her children.

programme.title: White Chicks
programme.desc: Ambitious but unlucky FBI agents Marcus and Kevin Copeland are hanging onto their jobs by a thread. When a plot to kidnap two spoiled socialite sisters is uncovered, Kevin and Marcus are handed a menial task to escort the spoiled brats from the airport to their hotel in the Hamptons. But their pampered pooch causes a traffic mishap, a fight ensues, and the sisters emerge slightly bloodied, and now unwilling to be seen at the important society weekend. He and Marcus will go undercover as the demanding divas, spring their sister act on the unsuspecting crème de la crème of Hamptons society, and, in the process, try to snare the kidnappers and restore their reputations.

programme.title: The Good Shepherd
programme.desc: The history of over 40 years in the CIA, told through the eyes of James Wilson, one of its founding officers.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels: Full Throttle
programme.desc: The "Angels", three investigative agents (Barrymore, Diaz and Liu) who work for the Charles Townsend Detective Agency, return for another high-octane series of adventures as they investigate the theft of a database of witness protection profiles, after five of the people on the list are murdered. They're aided by a new Bosley (Bernie Mac), in an adventure which pits them against a "fallen angel" (Moore), their old nemesis, the Thin Man (Glover), and others.

programme.title: Resident Evil
programme.desc: A deadly virus is unleashed that threatens to overrun the Earth.

programme.title: Resident Evil
programme.desc: After escaping from the Racoon City Medical Facility Alice searches for answers to the T-Virus and how to contain it, all while trying to find a way to escape the ruined city with fellow survivors.

programme.title: Resident Evil
programme.desc: Milla Jovovich is back to kill more zombies in the third chapter of the hit Resident Evil franchise! An action/horror film filled with huge special effects and edge-of-your-seat terror! Survivors of the Raccoon City catastrophe travel across the Nevada desert, hoping to make it to Alaska. Alice (Jovovich) joins the caravan and their fight against the evil Umbrella Corp.

programme.title: Here Comes The Boom
programme.desc: A biology teacher takes up fighting in mixed martial arts matches in order to raise money to save the music program at his school.

programme.title: A League Of Their Own (1992)
programme.desc: Daring female athletes win over a skeptical public and lead their team to victory in the WWII-era women's baseball league.

programme.title: Mo Money
programme.desc: A young con artist tries to go straight by getting a job to be near a beautiful woman.

programme.title: Stir Crazy
programme.desc: Take two guys, suitable for framing, get them in trouble, land them in jail... and you have a comedy guaranteed to drive anyone STIR CRAZY

programme.title: My All American
programme.desc: Freddie Steinmark, an underdog on the gridiron, faces the toughest challenge of his life after leading his team to a championship season.

programme.title: A Bronx Tale
programme.desc: Directed by acclaimed Oscar-winning actor Robert De Niro ('Goodfellas,' 'The Godfather: Part II') and adapted from Chazz Palminteri's successful one-man play (now a hit Broadway musical), 'A Bronx Tale' is a character-driven crime drama. Growing up in the Bronx in the 1960s, an adolescent is torn between his working-class father and a violent yet charismatic crime boss.

programme.title: To Write Love on Her Arms
programme.desc: Based on a true story, this musical drama tells the story of how artistic fantasy, music and friendships helped teenager Renee embark on a courageous journey towards recovery.

programme.title: The Hummingbird Project
programme.desc: In this modern epic, Kim Nguyen exposes the ruthless edge of our increasingly digital world. Cousins from New York, Vincent (Jesse Eisenberg) and Anton (Alexander Skarsgård) are players in the high-stakes game of High Frequency Trading. Their dream? To build a fiber-optic cable straight line between Kansas and New Jersey, making them millions. Together they push each other and everyone around them to breaking point on their quixotic adventure, while their old boss Eva Torres (Salma Hayek) will stop at nothing to beat them at their own game.

programme.title: The Darkest Hour
programme.desc: THE DARKEST HOUR is the story of five young people who find themselves stranded in Moscow, fighting to survive in the wake of a devastating alien attack. The 3D thriller highlights the classic beauty of Moscow alongside mind-blowing special effects from the minds of visionary filmmaker Timur Bekmambetov (Wanted, Night Watch) and director Chris Gorak.

programme.title: The Runners
programme.desc: When his little sister is abducted from a homecoming after-party in rural East Texas, Ryan is in a race against the clock to save her before she disappears into the underworld of sex trafficking forever.

programme.title: Reprisal
programme.desc: This gritty, action-packed crime thriller pairs action legends Bruce Willis (Die Hard) and Frank Grillo (Captain America series) in a chilling tale of justice and revenge. After surviving a brutal bank robbery, Jacob (Grillo) teams with his ex-cop neighbor (Willis) to track down the ruthless thief and avenge the assault. Desperate for cash to help treat his diabetic daughter, Jacob plans to take advantage of the situation, but in doing so, puts his family in the crosshairs of a killer.

programme.title: Fortress: Sniper's Eye
programme.desc: Fortress: Sniper's Eye is an explosive, all-out-action cyber-thriller starring action megastar Bruce Willis with Jesse Metcalfe (Escape Plan II) and Chad Michael Murray (Riverdale). Weeks after the deadly assault on Fortress Camp, Robert (Willis) makes a daring rescue to save Sasha, the widow of his old nemesis Balzary (Murray). But back in the camp's command bunker, it appears Sasha may have devious plans of her own. As a new attack breaks out, Robert is confronted with a familiar face he thought he'd never see again. Fortress: Sniper's Eye is from the producers of Lone Survivor and The Irishman and directed by Josh Sternfeld (Meskada).

programme.desc: By 2054, Fairbourne will be decommissioned due to rising tides. This is a film about the people labelled “the UK's first climate refugees”.

programme.title: Circumnavigate
programme.desc: Father of three and former lifeguard Brendon Prince from South Devon attempts to become the first person to stand-up paddleboard around mainland Britain - a challenge many have tried but none have achieved.

programme.title: Conservation Warriors
programme.desc: See how young Cash Daniels became a river hero when he started cleaning up the Tennessee River in his hometown, and join river activists Gary Swick and Jenni Kempf as they work to protect and restore the Fox River.

programme.title: Let Us Be Heroes
programme.desc: How much difference can one person make?

programme.title: For They Know Not What They Do
programme.desc: Follow the stories of four faith-based families with LGBTQ+ children caught in the crosshairs of sexuality, identity, and scripture.

programme.title: Play Hungry
programme.desc: In a country consisting of over 7500 islands and 175 languages, the Philippines is as diverse and disunited as it gets. But the one thing that ties it all together is the love for the game - basketball!

programme.title: Waves for Water
programme.desc: Follow pro surfer Jon Rose around the world as he works to bring clean drinking water to remote, poverty-stricken parts of Haiti, the Philippines and Brazil.

programme.title: Elephants
programme.desc: They say an elephant never forgets if we could enter the brain of a veteran elephant, what would we see?

programme.title: Enchanted Forest
programme.desc: There are few places on the planet more magical than the forest. To spend a day here is nature's way of offering a spa, a bathe in nature. There is enchantment at every turn.

programme.title: Code Breaker
programme.desc: In this episode Nicola and Craig visit Mana Pools National park and Thetford estate where they get close to an inquisitive elephant that Craig has known for many years. They observe closely as it feeds on fallen tree pods, this is Nicola's first close encounter

programme.title: Code Breaker
programme.desc: In this episode Nicola and Craig explore Victoria Falls and Hwange National park. The two meet vervet monkeys in the Victoria Falls rain forest and learn the basics of monkey language. Nicola learns about baboon behavior with newborns

programme.title: Bucketlist Africa
programme.desc: Africa: one of the most iconic and diverse continents. It's packed with a spectacular range of habitats and environments, and home to some of the best loved and dramatic wildlife on the planet. From the small and surprising to the enormous and entertaining, there's something for everyone's bucket list on this vast continent. From camels to giraffes, gorillas to buffalo, the sheer range of wildlife found in Africa is unbelievable. With so much to see, where would you begin your bucket list adventure?

programme.title: Bucketlist Australia
programme.desc: If Australia makes you think of beaches and BBQs, cricket and cork hats, you haven't seen anything yet. Giant deserts, ancient rainforest, tropical coasts and mystical rock formations. And not forgetting some of the weirdest and most wonderful animals on the planet. From iconic kangaroos and emus to the fearsome cassowary and cuddly koalas, you can find creatures here that you'll find nowhere else on the planet. There's only one place where you can find all these bucket list encounters – Australia!

programme.title: Elephants
programme.desc: They say an elephant never forgets if we could enter the brain of a veteran elephant, what would we see?

programme.title: 15th Meridian East
programme.desc: What ideas are people on the 15th meridian east developing to shape the future and leave tomorrow's generations a home worth living in? This consequence leads us to four future designers. From the barren Namib Desert to the glacier worlds of Spitsbergen, Sicily and the Croatian Mediterranean.

programme.title: 15th Meridian East
programme.sub-title: Similarity in Difference: Sow, Harvest, Eat – Our Conservatory
programme.desc: This episode focuses on people from five countries who share a common passion: The production of their own food and food. What culinary treasures are hidden in the different regions, from Spitsbergen to Sweden, Austria, Poland and Chad?

programme.title: 15th Meridian East
programme.sub-title: Similarity in Difference: From Generation to Generation
programme.desc: The journey leads from the Norwegian Vesterålen to Chad, the Aeolian Islands and the Polish Giant Mountains. As different as the landscapes and cultures may be, all people are united in their love for their children and their desire to give something to tomorrow's generation.

programme.title: 15th Meridian East
programme.sub-title: Similarity in Difference: The Raw Wilderness
programme.desc: Almost 11000 kilometres lie between the northernmost and southernmost point of the 15th meridian east. Here you will find extreme landscapes such as the shimmering heat of Africa or the eternal cold of northern Scandinavia. Five people from Spitsbergen, Namibia, Slovenia, Germany and Poland dedicate their lives to environmental protection.

programme.title: New Life
programme.desc: Baby animals beguile with their innocent charm. But while some remain harmless, others have a deep-rooted instinct. It may take weeks or months of training to hone their skills. Their landscapes and lifestyles maybe very different, but these babies are born to hunt.

programme.title: New Life
programme.desc: In a land of dangers, plant-eating animals are always at risk, and never more so than at the time of their birth out on the open they are vulnerable and there are few places to hide. But luckily some are born to run …

programme.title: New Life
programme.desc: It's a water world and life couldn't survive without it. And thanks to it, a mind blowing diversity of creatures thrive beneath the surface. Born to enjoy the riches underwater they must master their body's adaptations, learn to find food, to escape danger and above all become expert swimmers! Whether it's in rivers, on beaches or in the deep ocean, all must overcome the obstacles and fulfil their destiny, all are born to swim! Of all the habitats on earth, the ocean is perhaps the most challenging. Here salt, temperatures, currents and predators can make life difficult it's not an obvious place to want to bring up your babies… But even in these waters generation after generation beats the odds. They have overcome the challenges and become some of the most beautiful and graceful of creatures. But any baby born to swim has a lot to learn… All over the world there are creatures born to swim, and though humans are not, we seem determined to join them. Perhaps we are envious of their grace. Maybe we are all water babies at heart

programme.title: SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 11, Worlds 105 Kg (Part 1)
programme.desc: Welcome to Kokkola in Finland. This city will be the setting for the Lightweight World championship. Out of 24 athletes, only 16 will make it through to the final day, but who will champion each event and who is going to be eliminated?

programme.title: SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 12, Worlds 105 Kg (Part 2)
programme.desc: Its the second day, and the top 16 athletes have made it through to the final round. With another 4 events to go who will get the crown of world champion?

programme.title: SCL 2021 Season 7, Episode 13, Ukraine
programme.desc: Welcome to Ukraine and the wonderful capital city of Kyiv. Were here for the second time for the iconic truck pull World Championships! The reigning World champion Kelvin de Ruiter from Holland will defend his title.
